The apartment features mid-century modern furniture, oak floors, a single potted plant, and white walls. The mood is peaceful, dignified, and warm. Shot on medium format digital camera. Natural window light only. Shallow depth of field. Editorial photography style. No direct eye contact with camera. No exaggerated smiles. Scandinavian interior design.
